title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: A YouTube video discussing Google DeepMind's paper "From AGI to ASI" argues that artificial superintelligence (ASI) may represent a more significant milestone than AGI itself. The commentary suggests that once AGI is achieved and scaled through agent teams and AI-driven AI development, the resulting recursive improvement could be more transformative than reaching human-level AI.
writeup: The video covers a Google DeepMind paper titled "From AGI to ASI," which argues that human-level AI may be a starting point rather than an endpoint, opening a race toward artificial superintelligence. The paper's central claim is that copying, scaling, and chaining AGI-level systems to accelerate AI development could matter more than reaching AGI itself. It frames recursive self-improvement, AI agents, and test-time compute as the mechanisms that could carry systems past AGI toward ASI.
